title: Finite LU Decomposition Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite LU bad multiplier QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact LU replay computes the elimination multiplier as 2 while a malformed row claims 3, isolating a compact scalar equality conflict for the Farkas route.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional exact factorization rows only when they add distinct pivot, permutation, triangular-solve, rank, residual, or block-structure solver pressure; keep LU existence, pivoting correctness, conditioning, sparse behavior, and floating-point stability in theorem or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed rational A, L, U, right-hand side, pivots, triangular solves, determinant, and product as deterministic exact-rational replay obligations.
Route the false multiplier row through a source-linked QF_LRA artifact and checked Farkas evidence after exact replay computes the conflicting multiplier.
Expose the pack through the matrix computation learner and consumer query surfaces.
Keep LU existence, pivoting correctness, rank-deficient cases, sparse algorithms, floating-point conditioning, and stability claims marked Lean or numerical-honesty horizon.
